_comment: mcp-server-config.example.json — synthetic placeholder for the gitignored mcp-server-config.json. Copy to mcp-server-config.json and fill in the locally-hosted MCP server's listener config. Gitignored because it can contain auth bindings for sibling MCP processes.

n8n_credentials_create._note: Credential creation disabled by default — flip to true only on operator machines.
